content.fact_text: Implemented MfaController for production-grade TOTP-based Multi-Factor Authentication lifecycle management.

provenance_data.behaviour: Exposes secure endpoints for initiating and verifying MFA setup, integrating with MfaService for cryptographic operations and Redis for state persistence. Uses X-Correlation-ID for observability.
provenance_data.utility: Provides the HTTP interface layer for MFA setup and verification, ensuring domain-driven design and strict input validation.
